heroTitle: Training practices under control. Right there on the court.
heroSubtitle: P.L.A.W helps you plan, log and analyze every training practice from your phone — no paper, no spreadsheets.
featuresTitle: Everything you need, on the court and off it

features.title: Practice planning
features.description: Plan a practice in seconds, including duration and focus. If you've connected Google Calendar, the event gets added automatically.

features.title: Logging and review
features.description: After the practice, add the actual time and notes, and mark individual drills as skipped or swapped — the exact course of the practice stays on record. You can reorder drills anytime with the up/down arrows, as long as the practice is still planned.

features.title: Your own drill codes
features.description: 20 slots per focus area, matching your own shorthand system — no need to adapt to someone else's terminology.

features.title: Analytics and charts
features.description: Breakdowns by week, month, quarter and year with a comparison to last season, split by drill code and by stroke character.

features.title: Sharing with players, parents and managers
features.description: A player, their parent or their manager gets their own access to the training history — nothing to forward manually.

features.title: Built for the phone
features.description: The app is designed mobile first, so it's comfortable to use right on the court, not just at a desk.

pricingText: We're working on simple monthly and annual plans. Until then, registration is free.
finalCtaTitle: Get ready for the season with a clear overview
finalCtaSubtitle: Create an account in a couple of minutes and plan your first practice today.
footerTagline: P.L.A.W — a training log for tennis coaches
